U

unlock(long, String) - Method in class server.dao.AuthDAO
Releases the single-login lock for an actor by deleting its active_session row.
unreadCount(ServerResponse) - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Counts unacknowledged notifications in a LIST_NOTIFICATIONS response.
unregister(ClientSession, SubscriptionKey) - Method in class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
Reverses a previous SubscriptionRegistry.register(server.net.ClientSession, common.dto.SubscriptionKey).
unregisterAll(ClientSession) - Method in class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
Detaches session from every subscription it currently holds.
unsubscribe() - Method in class client.net.EventBus.Subscription
Detaches the callback this subscription represents.
unsubscribe(SubscriptionKey) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Removes a previous subscription.
UNSUBSCRIBE - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Cancel a previous RequestType.SUBSCRIBE.
unsubscribeAll() - Method in class client.view.BaseController
Detaches every active subscription belonging to this controller and sends matching UNSUBSCRIBE requests.
unsubscribeFromNotifications() - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
Detaches the notification subscription and tells the server to stop pushing.
UPDATE_RESERVATION - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Reschedule a reservation (date / time / party size).
updateConnStatus(boolean) - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
Reflects a connection-state change in the pill.
updated(String, long, Serializable) - Static method in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Builds an UPDATED event for a modified entity.
UPDATED - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.EventOp
An existing entity's fields were modified on the server.
updateField(int, ParamField, int) - Method in class server.dao.ParkDAO
Writes a new value to a single park parameter column.
updateReschedule(int, String, String, int, int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Reschedules a reservation: updates the scheduling fields (date, time, party size) and the recomputed price in the same statement.
updateReservation(int, String, String, int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Reschedules a PENDING/CONFIRMED reservation (date / optional time / party size).
updateStatus(int, ReservationStatus) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Updates the lifecycle status of a reservation and stamps status_changed_at = NOW() in the same statement.
upsertContact(long, String, String) - Method in class server.dao.MemberDAO
Find-or-create a visitor by national ID, saving only their contact details.
upsertVisitor(long, String, String, String, boolean) - Method in class server.dao.MemberDAO
Find-or-create the base visitor row for a national ID.
URL - Static variable in class server.db.DBConnection
JDBC URL of the local MySQL gonature schema.
user - Variable in class client.app.Session
The logged-in staff user (staff login), or null.
USER - Static variable in class server.db.DBConnection
MySQL user the server connects as.
UserDTO - Class in common.dto
Immutable data transfer object representing an authenticated staff user.
UserDTO(int, String, String, Role, Integer) - Constructor for class common.dto.UserDTO
Creates a fully populated staff user.
userIdLbl - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Role label of the logged-in user.
userInitialsLbl - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Avatar initials of the logged-in user.
UserLoginController - Class in client.view
Controller for UserLoginView.fxml — the combined connect + sign-in screen that runs at startup and again after logout.
UserLoginController(NetworkService, Session, Runnable) - Constructor for class client.view.UserLoginController
Creates the user-login controller.
UserLoginController.Quick - Record Class in client.view
One seeded account reachable via a quick-login button: staff carry a username; visitors carry a visitorId (the other is null).
username - Variable in record class client.view.UserLoginController.Quick
The field for the username record component.
username - Variable in class common.dto.UserDTO
Login username.
username() - Method in record class client.view.UserLoginController.Quick
Returns the value of the username record component.
usernameField - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Staff username input.
userNameLbl - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Display name of the logged-in user.
